reviews.reviewComments: Awalnya ditempatkan di kamar yang flush wc  ya gak nyala. Tapi bisa minta pindah. Dialihkan ke kamar yang sangat nyaman. Wajib nginep disini! Strategis pula!

reviews.reviewPositives: Reseptionist sangat ramah dan membantu menunjuk dimana ada supermarket dan memberi kabar ketika baju ayah saya tertinggal.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Cici dan koko yang punya hotel tidak mengerti konsep hotel syariah, kamar sangat kecil dan sulit orang untuk solat, tidak ada tanda arah kiblat.
Air panas sebetulnya included, tapi air panas dikamar kami tidak jalan. Ayah saya ada rematik jadi harus mandi air panas. Kami dipaksa membayar 50.000 per hari (!) untuk mengunakan air panas dari kamar sebelah. Sungguh keterlaluan. 
Tolong perbaiki management hotel sehingga customer tidak merasa kesal.

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan sangat buruk 👎. Saat sampai di lokasi saya di mintai biaya tambahan padahal sebelumnya saya sudah bayar lunas biaya penginapan. Mohon di tingkatkan lagi pelayanan nya Bapak/Ibu. Karena saya tidak ingin ada lagi costumer yang mendapatkan pengalaman seperti saya.
reviews.reviewComments: The service is very poor 👎. Upon arrival at the location, I was asked for additional fees even though I had already paid the accommodation in full beforehand. Please improve the service, Sir/Madam. I do not want any more customers to have an experience like mine.

reviews.originalComment: sampai hotel di bilang kamar kosong dan minta tambah uang. di bilang kalau sudah tambah uang di kasih kamar yg lebih bagus. padahal kamar sempit dan tidak nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: Arriving at the hotel, they said the room was full and requested extra money. They claimed that if I paid more, I would get a better room. However, the room was cramped and uncomfortable.

reviews.originalComment: sampai hotel di bilang kamar kosong dan minta tambah uang. di bilang kalau sudah tambah uang di kasih kamar yg lebih bagus. padahal kamar sempit dan tidak nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: Arriving at the hotel, they said the room was full and requested extra money. They claimed that if I paid more, I would get a better room. However, the room was cramped and uncomfortable.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel nya sudah tutup tdk beroperasi lagi jgn pesan via agoda atau via online lainnya, sy sdh pesan dan sdh bayar uang melayang percumq hotelnya lagi di renovasi mungkin mau di fungsikan untuk yg lain selain hotel. Sangat di sayang kan masih ada di aplikasi online.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel has closed and is no longer operating, do not book through Agoda or other online platforms. I have already booked and paid, but the hotel is under renovation and may be repurposed for something other than a hotel. It's a shame it is still listed on online applications.

Ada water dispenser kat tepi reception. Bilik tak kedap bunyi, orang luar bilik boleh dengar kira bising dengan anak2. Bilik sempit, nak solat pun ngam2 je ruang utk sorang. Tak banyak kedai makan sekitar tu, ada indomaret/alfamart dlm 10 mins walking distance. Masjid dekat. Masa check in kena tinggalkan passport atau deposit kat reception sampai checkout. Air paip keruh, kadang keruh sampai warna air teh. Tandas kotor dengan rambut penuh kat lubang, sinki berdaki. Lantai bilik pun kotor, kena lap sendiri untuk bagi selesa sikit. Katil ok, bolehla stakat untuk tumpang tidur malam. Sbb kami sampai agak lewat dan esoknya jam 6.30 pagi dah checkout. Hotel lain pun murah juga tapi at least bersih sikit dari sini.
Tempat nya strategis, pelayanan baik dan ramah

reviews.originalComment: Air asin, bau kaporit sangat menyengat, kalau cuci muka mata perih. Kamar ada bagian yang masih kotor.
reviews.reviewComments: The air is pungent with the smell of chlorine, and washing the face causes eye irritation. There are parts of the room that are still dirty.

reviews.originalComment: Kami tertipu dan tidak bisa di refund
reviews.reviewComments: We were deceived and cannot get a refund.

reviews.originalComment: Terimakasih kamar nya luas... fasilitas nya lengkap
reviews.reviewComments: Thank you, the room is spacious... the facilities are complete.

reviews.originalComment:
Saya ikuti alamat hotel sesuai map, ternyata di arahkan ke alamat kimia farma. Sampai saya tanya ke mereka dan mereka tidak tau hotel tersebut di daerah pocut baren tersebut. 
1 jam saya berputar nyari alamat dan tanya ke orang. Tidak ada ketemu
reviews.reviewComments: I followed the hotel address according to the map, but it turned out to lead me to the Kimia Farma address. I asked them and they didn't know about the hotel in the Pocut Baren area. I spent 1 hour searching for the address and asking people. I couldn't find it.
